title: microchilus alajuelae
intro: Microchilus alajuelae is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane family. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in its native Costa Rica, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microchilus alajuelae include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
